title: Protect the Confidentiality of CUI at Rest
description: Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest.

checks.name: BitLocker is Enabled on System Drive
checks.purpose: Verify BitLocker protection is On for the C: drive via manage-bde to ensure CUI stored on the system drive is encrypted at rest

checks.name: BitLocker Encryption is 100% Complete
checks.purpose: Confirm the BitLocker encryption percentage is 100%, ensuring no unencrypted data remains on the system drive

checks.name: CUI at Rest Encryption Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify documented policy identifies all locations where CUI is stored at rest and mandates encryption for each â€” policy review only

checks.name: BitLocker is Enabled on System Drive
checks.purpose: Verify BitLocker protection is On for the server's C: drive to encrypt CUI at rest

checks.name: BitLocker Encryption is 100% Complete
checks.purpose: Confirm BitLocker encryption percentage is 100% on the server's system drive, ensuring all CUI is fully protected

checks.name: CUI at Rest Encryption Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify documented policy mandates encryption for all CUI at rest locations including databases, file shares, and backup media â€” policy review only

checks.name: Data Drive Encryption Verified
checks.purpose: Verify BitLocker or EFS encryption is applied to all data drives storing CUI, not just the system drive â€” requires manual review of additional volumes

checks.name: LUKS Encrypted Partitions Exist
checks.purpose: Verify LUKS-encrypted partitions exist on the system via lsblk, confirming data-at-rest encryption is deployed for CUI storage

checks.name: LUKS Device Mappings are Active
checks.purpose: Confirm LUKS device mappings (dm-crypt) are active and mounted, verifying that encrypted volumes are properly unlocked and accessible only through the encryption layer

checks.name: CUI at Rest Encryption Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify documented policy mandates encryption for all CUI stored at rest â€” policy review only

checks.name: LUKS Encrypted Partitions Exist
checks.purpose: Verify LUKS-encrypted partitions exist on the system via lsblk, confirming data-at-rest encryption is deployed for CUI storage

checks.name: LUKS Device Mappings are Active
checks.purpose: Confirm LUKS device mappings (dm-crypt) are active and mounted, verifying that encrypted volumes are properly unlocked and accessible only through the encryption layer

checks.name: CUI at Rest Encryption Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify documented policy mandates encryption for all CUI stored at rest â€” policy review only

remediation: Enable BitLocker on all drives storing CUI via GPO or manage-bde. Ensure encryption percentage reaches 100%. Configure TPM+PIN key protectors and escrow recovery keys. On Linux, ensure all partitions containing CUI are encrypted with LUKS (set up during OS installation or via cryptsetup luksFormat on data volumes).
